news.summary: Ithaca, Michigan - On May 22, 2025, Commercial National Financial Corporation (Pink Sheets: CEFC) disclosed plans for a share repurchase program. The Board of Directors gave the green light to this initiative, allowing for the buyback of shares worth a total of $1,000,000.
news.headline: Commercial National Financial Corp (Pink Sheets: CEFC) announces $1,000,000 share repurchase program.

news.summary: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. announced that Radisson Mining Resources Inc. is expanding their 22,000-meter 2025 drill program by an additional 18,000 meters. The drilling will concentrate on the O’Brien Mine and East O’Brien area of the New Mineral Resource, reaching a depth of up to 2 kilometers. Globex maintains a 2% Net Smelter Royalty on the Kewagama Gold Mine section in the East O’Brien area. Previous and ongoing drilling has encountered high-grade gold values and visible gold. Visual free gold was observed in Radisson’s recent press release on May 21, 2025, highlighting holes OB-24-363 and OB24-361.
news.headline: Globex Mining reveals more visible gold on Kewagama Royalty Claims, Radisson expands 2025 drill program by 18,000 meters.

news.summary: Rio Tinto has been selected as the preferred partner for the Salares Altoandinos lithium project in Chile's Atacama region by state-owned mining company ENAMI. This project has the potential to become a top-tier lithium development. Rio Tinto's Chief Executive, Jakob Stausholm, expressed gratitude for the opportunity and stated the company's commitment to developing the project. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the lithium sector, with large reserves in the region.
news.headline: Rio Tinto chosen as partner for Salares Altoandinos lithium project in Chile by ENAMI. Project has world-class potential.

news.summary: VenturEd Solutions introduced its upgraded School and Student Services® (SSS) platform in Tampa, Florida on May 22, 2025. The new platform boasts direct IRS integration, resulting in quicker processing, reduced errors, and a significantly enhanced family experience. Early users have reported increased speed in operations, fewer mistakes, and an overall improved user journey.
news.headline: VenturEd Solutions launches new SSS platform with IRS integration, offering faster processing & improved user experience. TAMPA, Fla., May 22, 2025 /PRNewswire-PRWeb.

news.summary: Taylor Guitars has collaborated with Sony Pictures Consumer Products and HBO® to launch a new acoustic guitar inspired by the one played by Joel and Ellie. The guitar features a unique moth inlay and a tobacco sunburst top. This collaboration was announced on May 22, 2025 in El Cajon, California. Taylor Guitars is known for being a top player in the acoustic guitar industry.
news.headline: Taylor Guitars unveils 'The Last Of Us' replica 314c guitar identical to the show, with moth inlay and tobacco sunburst top.

news.summary: The historic Virgin Islands project has moved one step closer to receiving tax credit certification after receiving approval from the National Park Service (NPS). This milestone was reached on May 12, 2025 in Charlotte Amalie, U.S. Virgin Islands. Fifteenand9Main successfully secured this approval, signaling progress for the project.
news.headline: Fifteenand9Main reaches milestone with NPS approval for historic Virgin Islands project, on track for tax credit certification.

news.summary: Introducing the latest innovation from Pate - the Pate Sound Shield, a pioneer product within their new line focused on providing sound reduction and vibration isolation for roof-mounted equipment curbs in commercial and industrial buildings. Situated in LOMBARD, Ill., the unveiling took place on May 22, 2025. This cutting-edge solution aims to enhance sound quality and minimize disturbances in various industrial settings. More details and specifications will be available upon release.
news.headline: Pate Company debuts Sound Shield for noise reduction and vibration isolation in commercial buildings.

news.summary: Bryte Lyfe marks a successful first year with a remarkable member retention rate and a vast selection of over 3 million hotels. The company's one-of-a-kind Bucket Lyst loyalty initiative, along with its emphasis on achieving "Total Life Balance," has propelled exceptional travel opportunities and life-changing experiences for its dedicated membership base. With a strong focus on engagement, Bryte Lyfe...
news.headline: Bryte Lyfe marks one-year milestone with record retention, 3M hotels. Unique loyalty program and "Total Life Balance" stand out.

news.summary: A prominent player in the industry is broadening its services to offer comprehensive NetSuite and SuiteProjects Pro support for Professional Services Organizations. Headquartered in METAIRIE, La., the company, known as Top Step, has established itself as a leader in Professional Services Automation, boasting more than 16 years of experience in the field. This expansion showcases their commitment to providing end-to-end solutions for clients in this sector. The development was announced on May 22, 2025, underscoring the company's dedication to enhancing their offerings and catering to the needs of Professional Services Organizations.
news.headline: Top Step now offers NetSuite consulting services for professional services organizations, leveraging 16 years of experience in the industry.

news.summary: In Savannah, Georgia, on May 22, 2025, myNetWatchman, a prominent company specializing in real-time monitoring of compromised credentials and prevention of account takeovers (ATO), has named Madhura Belani to lead the charge in driving innovation in ATO prevention and bolstering cybersecurity efforts. This strategic move aims to strengthen their position as a frontrunner in the industry.
news.headline: myNetWatchman appoints Madhura Belani as Chief Product Officer to enhance cybersecurity and ATO prevention.

news.summary: Acutrack Inc., a prominent provider of book fulfillment solutions, has expanded its nationwide reach with the recent opening of a new East Coast fulfillment center in Livermore, California on May 22, 2025. This logistics facility aims to reduce shipping times and costs, thereby improving overall efficiency for the company. This expansion marks a significant step in their strategy, allowing them to cater to an even larger customer base.
news.headline: Acutrack opens new book fulfillment center in Bethlehem, PA, expanding nationwide reach, reducing shipping times and costs.

news.summary: Renée Mosley Delcollo, an associate specializing in Intellectual Property Litigation and Commercial Litigation at global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP's Delaware branch, has been recognized on the 2025 Delaware Super Lawyers magazine "Rising Stars" list. This achievement was announced on May 22, 2025 in WILMINGTON, Del.
news.headline: Renée Mosley Delcollo of Greenberg Traurig, LLP named to 2025 Delaware Super Lawyers Rising Stars list. WILMINGTON, Del.

news.summary: BrikMate's CEO and Co-Founder, Josef Pipoly, recently spoke with host Karla Jo Helms about the issues surrounding commercial real estate lease management. Through the use of artificial intelligence (AI), BrikMate aims to address unstructured data challenges, eliminate outdated workflows, and provide real-time insights to improve efficiency in this sector. This innovative approach has already shown promise in revolutionizing the industry and has captured the attention of many stakeholders.
news.headline: Josef Pipoly of BrikMate uses AI to improve commercial real estate lease management, aiming to overcome industry inefficiencies.

news.summary: ISI has recently revamped its Emotional and Mental Health Awareness Training Program, offering schools a free resource to aid international students. The program now features updated content and a modern design. This initiative aims to provide digital support to international students, assisting them during their time abroad.
news.headline: ISI relaunches Emotional & Mental Health Training Program for international students to support their mental wellbeing.

news.summary: TED, the renowned platform for sharing valuable ideas, has collaborated with Genuin to enhance its thought leadership through new content formats and advanced technology. The partnership aims to leverage AI for community-building, curation, and moderation. The initiative was announced in New York on May 22, 2025. TED, known for spreading impactful ideas, expects this partnership to further strengthen its position in the market.
news.headline: TED partners with Genuin to introduce TED Shorts, offering bite-sized video brilliance and expanding thought leadership with new content formats. AI-powered features aim to enhance community engagement.

news.summary: HR Simplistic has expanded its business solutions by partnering with Insurance Simplistic Solutions to integrate insurance services into its payroll and HR offerings. This strategic move aims to provide a comprehensive approach and boost the company's mission to streamline operations.
news.headline: HR Simplistic adds insurance services to its portfolio through partnership with Insurance Simplistic Solutions, enhancing holistic solutions for clients.

news.summary: Six attorneys based in Philadelphia at the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP were honored in the 2025 editions of Pennsylvania Super Lawyers and Pennsylvania Super Lawyers Rising Stars. The announcement was made in Philadelphia on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: 6 Greenberg Traurig attorneys from Philly office named in PA Super Lawyers & Rising Stars 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement made on May 22, 2025, Carl Barkemeyer from Barkemeyer Law Firm has been named to the prestigious 2025 list of the Nation's Top One Percent by the National Association of Distinguished Counsel. This recognition highlights his exceptional legal expertise and places him among an elite group of professionals in the industry. This achievement underscores his standing as a top-tier legal practitioner, solidifying his reputation in the legal community.
news.headline: Carl Barkemeyer selected to 2025 Nation's Top One Percent by National Association of Distinguished Counsel.

news.summary: Chester County, Pennsylvania - On May 22, 2025, King Swings marked their inaugural involvement at an event by launching an exclusive Eagle's Nest Inclusive Playground. Renowned for their top-notch vinyl swing sets and playgrounds, the brand showcased this new offering.
news.headline: King Swings partners with Eagles Autism Challenge 2025, debuts Eagle's Nest Playground in Chester County.

news.summary: A team of experts will assess if an organization's culture, workforce, governance, leadership, and data are suitable for AI projects to improve operations and service delivery. The assessment will take place in State College, Pennsylvania on May 22, 2025. The initiative is part of Mission Critical's efforts to enhance operations using AI technology.
news.headline: Mission Critical Partners offers new AI readiness assessment service for public-sector organizations in State College, PA.

news.summary: Falls continue to be the primary cause of death within the construction sector, despite being one of the most avoidable risks. With this in mind, Sam Boak, President of Boak & Sons, has taken an initiative to enhance safety measures across the industry. Boak has extended an invitation to host the 2025 Stand-Down for Safety event organized by the Ohio Bureau of Workers Compensation. This move aims to tackle the issue of fall-related fatalities in the sector, which account for a significant portion of workplace deaths. The event is expected to gather a large number of industry professionals to raise awareness and implement strategies to prevent such incidents in the future.
news.headline: Sam Boak hosts 2025 "Stand-Down for Safety" event to promote industry-wide safety and prevent falls in construction.

news.summary: In recent findings, it has been highlighted that a personalized titanium implant has the potential to enhance functionality and overall well-being following surgery for maxillary cancer. This innovative approach serves as a viable solution for individuals who are not suitable candidates for conventional implants. The study, conducted in GLEN ALLEN, Virginia, on May 22, 2025, reveals noteworthy outcomes for patients, showcasing substantial improvements in their quality of life post-surgery. Published in the Journal of Oral Implantology, this report signifies a significant advancement in the field, demonstrating a promising alternative with key benefits for those undergoing maxillary cancer treatment.
news.headline: Custom titanium implant improves quality of life for maxillary cancer patients. Journal of Oral Implantology article from May 22, 2025.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Meritage Homes Corporation, the fifth-largest homebuilder in the U.S., publicly revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.43 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on June 30, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as of June 16, 2025, at the market's closing.
news.headline: Meritage Homes (NYSE: MTH) declares $0.43/share dividend, payable on June 30, 2025 to shareholders of record by June 16.
US VP Vance is to speak at "Bitcoin 2025" in Las Vegas on May 28th.

news.summary: Dan Crociata has been named the new Chief Executive Officer of Endries International Inc., based in Brillion, Wisconsin, following the tenure of Michael Knight. The company, known for its expertise in fastener solutions, Class-C components, and supply chain fulfillment, made the announcement on May 22, 2025. Crociata takes over the leadership role as the company aims to continue its global presence and influence in the industry.
news.headline: Endries International names Dan Crociata as new CEO, taking over from Michael Knight. Announced on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Launching this new product paves the way for the company's upcoming Innovation Keynote and marks a significant step beyond conventional automation. This shift allows businesses to translate their objectives into cross-channel campaigns that yield instant outcomes. The event took place in Chicago on May 22, 2025, and was announced via PRNewswire. ActiveCampaign, a prominent marketing company, is at the forefront of this development.
news.headline: ActiveCampaign introduces Active Intelligence for advanced marketing automation. Aiming for seamless cross-channel campaigns.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Blade Air Mobility, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLDE) revealed that CEO Rob Wiesenthal and CFO Will Heyburn will speak at the Jefferies eVTOL / AAM Summit on May 28, 2025, at 10:40am ET. The event will be live-streamed, with a replay accessible on the company's investor relations website following the presentation.
news.headline: Blade Air Mobility presents at Jefferies eVTOL/AAM Summit on May 28, 2025, with CEO and CFO speaking. Webcast available.

news.summary: RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) convened its Annual General Meeting on May 22, 2025, in Stockholm, Sweden. During the meeting, key decisions were made. Among these was the re-election of board members Carl Filip Bergendal, Johan Löf, Günther Mårder, and Britta Wallgren. This resolution was one of several adopted during the meeting. The event held significance for the company as it sets the tone for its operations in the upcoming fiscal year.
news.headline: RaySearch Laboratories AB held AGM on May 22, 2025 in Stockholm, Sweden. Carl Filip Bergendal, Johan Löf, Günther Mårder, Britta Wallgren were re-elected.

news.summary: PotlatchDeltic Corporation (Nasdaq: PCH) shared that their CEO, Eric J. Cremers, and CFO, Wayne Wasechek, will be presenting a company overview at the REITweek Conference in New York on June 4, 2025, at around 8:00 am Eastern Time. The live audio webcast of the presentation will be accessible through the Investors page on their official website at www.potlatchdeltic.com. This event provides an opportunity for investors to gain insights into the company's operations and future plans.
news.headline: PotlatchDeltic executives to present at REITweek in NY on June 4, 2025; overview for investors.

news.summary: Chicago-based real estate firm Cushman & Wakefield recently appointed Kelly Evans to the role of Senior Managing Director in the Multi-Market Advisory Solutions team. Evans brings a wealth of experience to the role as she joins the company.
news.headline: Kelly Evans joins Cushman & Wakefield as Senior Managing Director of Multi-Market Advisory Solutions team in Chicago.

news.summary: Today, in St. Petersburg, Florida, Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) disclosed that its Chairman, President, and CEO, Michael Benstock, along with CFO Mike Koempel, will be present at the Barrington Research Spring Investment Conference on May 29, 2025. They will be conducting virtual investor meetings all through the day.
news.headline: Superior Group of Companies to attend Barrington Research Spring Investment Conference on May 29, 2025. CEO and CFO to host virtual investor meetings.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 22, 2025, Lofta, a prominent company specializing in at-home sleep apnea testing and treatment, announced a collaboration with Bloom Mental Health, a provider of psychiatric care for individuals of all ages. The partnership aims to improve patient accessibility to sleep apnea diagnostics. This collaboration between Lofta and Bloom Mental Health is set to offer important benefits to individuals struggling with sleep disorders.
news.headline: At-home sleep apnea company Lofta partners with Bloom Mental Health to improve access to diagnostics.

news.summary: During the annual meeting held on May 22, 2025, ECN Capital Corp. (TSX: ECN) announced that all eight nominees listed in the Circular dated April 22, 2025 were successfully elected as directors. The meeting saw a total representation of 210,980,127 Common Shares and 27,450,000 Series E Shares, accounting for around 77.19% of the total votes. Common Shares and Series E Shares were jointly voted as a single class for all matters. The results of the virtual meeting are as follows: all eight nominees were elected as directors.
news.headline: ECN Capital confirms election of 8 directors at annual meeting with 210,980,127 Common Shares and 27,450,000 Series E Shares.
